name: vitals-overview-panel
title: Vitals Overview Panel
description: A vitals overview — a responsive grid of VitalsCard tiles plus an optional slot for dial/gauge widgets (SpO₂, BMI). Composes WidgetPanel + VitalsCard.

props.name: vitals
props.description: Vital tiles; each is a VitalsCard's props (value, unit, status, trend, range).

props.name: extras
props.description: Dial/gauge widgets (Spo2Dial, BmiGauge) beside the tiles.

clinicalNotes: Every tile inherits VitalsCard's discipline: status and trend-goodness are caller-supplied, never inferred, and units + reference ranges travel with the value. Keep the abnormal ones visible — do not hide normal vitals to save space, because the absence of a vital is itself clinically meaningful. The extras slot is for shaped widgets (an SpO₂ dial, a BMI gauge) that read better than a plain tile.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. The most-requested clinical widget; feeds every block.
